basic_details.job_title: Paradip Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Paradip Port Authority Dy. Chief Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website Paradip Port Authority. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Deputy Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/institution
qualification.details: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/institution with twelve years experience in the executive cadre in the planning/construction/design/maintenance preferably of port & marine structures in an industrial/commercial/Govt. undertaking.

selection_process: Absorption through Composite Method Merit based on ACRs/APARs with benchmark Very Good
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Paradip Port Authority Deputy Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 through Online mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://paradipport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Paradip Port Authority Dy. Chief Engineer (Civil) (Dy. HOD) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Dy. Chief Engineer (Civil) (Dy. HOD) post is 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Dy. Chief Engineer (Civil) (Dy. HOD) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Dy. Chief Engineer (Civil) (Dy. HOD) position at Paradip Port Authority.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Dy. Chief Engineer (Civil) (Dy. HOD) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Dy. Chief Engineer (Civil) (Dy. HOD) post is in the pay scale of Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 2,20,000.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/institution with twelve years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Dy. Chief Engineer (Civil) (Dy. HOD) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves absorption through a composite method and merit based on ACRs/APARs with a benchmark of Very Good.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Paradip Port Authority, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The specific address for sending the application form is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the notification for the complete details.
